title: Strong Grip Clothes Pegs 72 Pack – Durable Plastic & Metal Pegs for Secure Hold Washing Line – Assorted Colours, Heavy-Duty Clothespin, Hanger Clip, Windproof, Non-Slip
features: 💪 Strong Grip, Secure Hold – Designed to withstand windy days, these pegs offer a firm grip on laundry without leaving marks or damaging fabrics.
🧺 72 Pegs in Total – Each set includes 2 packs of 36 pegs, giving you a generous total of 72 pegs to tackle large laundry loads with ease.
🛠️ Built to Last – Made from tough plastic with metal springs, these pegs combine durability with weather resistance for everyday use.
📦 Neatly Packed for Convenience – Comes in two compact packs, perfect for storage, travel, or splitting between indoor and outdoor use.
🎨 Assorted Blue & Grey Tones – Stylish and practical, these pegs come in calm, neutral shades that complement any outdoor or indoor drying setup
description: Transform your laundry routine with these reliable 72-pack Strong Grip Clothes Pegs. Engineered for superior performance, each peg combines a sturdy plastic body with a robust metal spring mechanism, ensuring your washing stays securely fastened to the line even on breezy days. The thoughtfully designed pegs measure 8cm x 3.5cm x 1.5cm, providing comfortable handling whilst maintaining a powerful grip on everything from lightweight garments to heavy towels and bedding. Available in a modern colour palette of blue and grey assorted, these pegs bring both style and functionality to your outdoor drying setup. The generous pack size ensures you'll always have plenty of pegs on hand for those bigger washing loads, whilst their durable construction promises long-lasting performance through countless washing days. Perfect for any household's laundry needs, these versatile pegs offer dependable strength and practical design for everyday use.
